review_event_label: Sprint-level hazard and control update review
notes: Clinical safety lead owns whether the sprint delta remains advisory or becomes material.
Material changes cannot merge without the required evidence, and approvers must stay distinct from the proposer.
Release approval stays blocked until freeze, runtime, publication, and trust evidence remain exact for the candidate.
Operational ownership and clinical safety share the review, but independence remains required for high-impact follow-up.

cadence: within three business days of delta
notes: This review keeps standards drift and onboarding deltas machine-visible instead of ad hoc.
This standing forum owns open gaps, recurring risk review, and closure dates for unresolved blockers.
Used when blockers, hazards, or stale authority emerge outside normal cadence.
